channel.title: NAK Dhama, SK Patel, K Sharun, M Pathak, R Tiwari, MI Yatoo, YS Malik, R Sah, AA Rabaan, PK Panwar, KP Singh, I Michalak, W Chaicumpa, DF Martinez-Pulgarin, DK Bonilla-Aldana, AJ Rodriguez-Morales | PlatCOVID

item.title: SARS-CoV-2 jumping the species barrier: Zoonotic lessons from SARS, MERS and recent advances to combat this pandemic virus.
